data.title: Bitcoin may rally soon with $90K crucial, as Hash Ribbons & Fear/Greed Index signal buy opportunities amid pressures.
data.description: Supporters of Bitcoin remain strong as the price defends the $90,000 mark, with indicators like Hash Ribbons and the Fear and Greed Index showing positive signals for a potential uptrend. Despite recent challenges, the cryptocurrency is poised for a rally, boosted by investor confidence in the market.

data.title: Endace releases OSm 7.3, offering 50x search performance boost, revolutionizing packet capture and storage.
data.description: New Zealand-based Endace has recently launched Endace OSm 7.3 in collaboration with Austin, Texas. This new release marks a significant advancement in packet capture, storage, and analysis by removing conventional obstacles. The update boasts a remarkable 50x improvement in search performance compared to previous versions. This enhancement is set to revolutionize the way data is captured and processed, making it a game-changer in the industry.

data.title: Barrick appoints Helen Cai as CFO effective March 1, 2026, replacing Graham Shuttleworth. Cai has 20+ years of experience.
data.description: Barrick Mining Corporation's stock (NYSE: B) saw an increase on Tuesday as the company announced Helen Cai as the new Senior Executive Vice President and CFO starting March 1, 2026. Cai will be taking over from Graham Shuttleworth, who will step down post the company's year-end results release. With over 20 years of experience in equity research, corporate finance, strategy, capital markets, and M&A in mining, industrial, and technology sectors, Cai has been part of Barrick's Board since November 2021. More details on this news can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Big investors buying more ETH, LINK, and BTC while small investors sell off, causing market split.
data.description: Recent data from on-chain sources reveal that large holders, or "whales," are actively acquiring significant amounts of Ethereum (ETH), Chainlink (LINK), and Bitcoin (BTC). This accumulation trend among whales is occurring concurrently with ongoing selling pressure from retail investors. This pattern emphasizes a notable discrepancy or divergence in the market, suggesting differing sentiment and strategies between large holders and smaller retail traders.
